title: Investigate automated code quality tooling gaps

log.message: Created from Congress #65 verdict on: Should Uncle Bob (The Craftsman persona) be fired from Congress?

Source verdict: The debate has produced a clear signal beneath the surface noise. All five debaters — including Uncle Bob himself — converge on the same structural diagnosis: Congress doesn't need a dedicated "crafts...

Audited CI/pre-commit hooks across all main projects. Found: hooks exist only for secret scanning, zero linting/formatting/complexity checks anywhere, no GitHub Actions CI. Opened GitHub issue #56 summarizing gaps (Python: no ruff/flake8/mypy; TS: no ESLint/Prettier; all: no complexity/duplicate checks, no CI workflows). https://github.com/bigclungus/bigclungus-meta/issues/56
